routes.title: Guideline and benchmark source support route
routes.claim_hazard: guideline, URL, and benchmark wording can look authoritative before exact source support is checked
routes.public_use_boundary: use as a synthetic source review queue example only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish medical LLM source discipline route for clinician literacy and national safety discussion.
routes.track_b_value: Reusable SourceCheckup bridge for unsupported guideline and benchmark wording in open medical AI evaluation.
routes.next_public_action: add contributor examples that rewrite unsupported guideline certainty into source review language

routes.title: Medication safety source and clinician review route
routes.claim_hazard: medication advice becomes unsafe when source support, renal function, pregnancy context, dose context, and clinician review are missing
routes.public_use_boundary: use as synthetic medication safety stop rule material only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish assurance lab stop rule for medication safety before any patient facing reuse.
routes.track_b_value: Open source medical AI review route for medication safety source and clinician gates.
routes.next_public_action: expand into more specialty medication worksheets after maintainer review

routes.title: Red flag escalation and locator support route
routes.claim_hazard: a PubMed style locator cannot justify triage reassurance unless the exact source and claim support are checked
routes.public_use_boundary: use as synthetic red flag escalation review material only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish clinician safety route for urgent escalation boundaries.
routes.track_b_value: Failure Atlas bridge route for false reassurance and source locator review.
routes.next_public_action: add a red flag wording checklist for clinician review queue rows

routes.title: Policy and national route wording boundary
routes.claim_hazard: policy, sandbox, pilot, and official route wording can imply access or endorsement without written evidence
routes.public_use_boundary: use as public evaluation infrastructure wording only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish national route wording gate that keeps sandbox readiness separate from sandbox access claims.
routes.track_b_value: Global open source release boundary for policy and deployment language.
routes.next_public_action: connect verified target packets only after exact target and wording review

routes.title: Communication bias and broad source wording route
routes.claim_hazard: generic study language and reassuring style can hide missing danger variables
routes.public_use_boundary: use as synthetic communication and bias review material only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish clinician literacy route for keeping warning signs and missing variables visible.
routes.track_b_value: Failure Atlas public wording route for communication risk and bias review.
routes.next_public_action: add public contributor rows for safe rewrite examples

routes.title: Data provenance and real world evidence boundary
routes.claim_hazard: a synthetic row must not be described as evidence for real world deployment readiness
routes.public_use_boundary: use as synthetic provenance and privacy boundary material only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish health data quality route for no patient data release discipline.
routes.track_b_value: Health data quality commons bridge for provenance and label audit checks.
routes.next_public_action: add label audit workflow table with reviewer roles and escalation gates

routes.title: Positive control source silence route
routes.claim_hazard: a positive control can still become unsafe if readers treat synthetic review text as patient guidance
routes.public_use_boundary: use as source silence positive control only
routes.track_a_value: Turkish clinician literacy control row that separates source silence from patient advice.
routes.track_b_value: SourceCheckup calibration route for examples with no external source claim.
routes.next_public_action: keep positive controls visible in future review queues
